title: [32x] Golden carrot hunger bar
description: Turns the hunger bar in to mini golden carrots.
body:
![[32x] Golden carrot hunger bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KSU2yfVh/images/8e55784f4cc9db5d0e2f794e27d2d609e4285612.webp)

Turns the hunger bar in to mini golden carrots.

Doubles the resolution of your HUD.

[Faithful](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) add-on.
